reviews.comment:
Buen servicio, destaco  la higiene de los sanitarios y los espacios al aire libre para consumir alimentos. Tener en cuenta que si comprás en el Full y querés comer afuera, tenés que pedir para llevar.

(Translated by Google)
Good service; I especially appreciated the cleanliness of the restrooms and the outdoor seating areas. Keep in mind that if you buy food at the Full and want to eat outside, you have to order takeout.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMG9Yb1RnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena y rápida atención en el Full. Pocos empleados en las dársenas de combustible que genera demora en la atención. Hermoso parque para descansar al aire libre

(Translated by Google)
Good and fast service at the Full. Few employees at the fuel pumps cause delays. Beautiful park for relaxing outdoors.
